data.title: Aria Completes $15 Million in Seed and Strategic Rounds, Led by Polychain Capital and Others
data.description: Aria, an asset-on-chain platform based on the Story Protocol, announced the completion of a $15 million seed and strategic funding round, led by Polychain Capital and Neoclassic Capital, at a valuation of $50 million. Aria, which specializes in tokenizing music IP, has launched its first APL token, allowing holders to earn music copyright income through staking. (The Block)

data.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy checks every box for S&P 500 inclusion with liquidity to match

According to Bloomberg, the company posted an unrealized gain of $14 billion last quarter, putting it firmly into the profit zone the index demands. That was the last missing piece for […]

data.title: Coinbase to List Awe (AWE)
data.description: Coinbase has announced support for AWE (AWE) on the Base network. Please do not send this asset over other networks, as this may result in loss of funds. Trading will begin on or after 9:00 AM PT on September 4, 2025, subject to liquidity conditions. Trading of the AWE-USD pair will launch in phases and may be restricted in some regions.

data.title: Stripe and Paradigm's Tempo Launches Private Testnet for Stablecoin Payments
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Stripe and Paradigm have launched the private testnet for their payment blockchain, Tempo. Designed specifically for stablecoin and real-world payments, Tempo aims to offer low-cost transactions, support for transferring and paying gas fees with any stablecoin, optional privacy features, and a transaction capacity exceeding 100,000 TPS.

The initial partners for Tempo include notable companies such as Anthropic, Coupang, Deutsche Bank, DoorDash, Lead Bank, Mercury, Nubank, OpenAI, Revolut, Shopify, Standard Chartered Bank, and Visa.

Tempo's applications span global payments, payroll distribution, embedded financial accounts, fast and low-cost cross-border remittances, tokenized deposits with 24/7 settlement, micropayments, and payments for intelligent agents. Built on Reth, Tempo is compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM).

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Tariffs won't cause inflation
data.description: Fed Governor nominee Milan said tariffs will not cause inflation, and inflation views are not only affected by monetary policy. (Jinshi)

The sharp decline dragged the stock well below its debut price, dealing a blow to what had once been hyped as one of the strongest tech […]

data.title: U.S. Senate Banking Committee to Release Market Structure Legislation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett reported that the U.S. Senate Banking Committee is expected to unveil a new market structure legislation draft soon. This draft reflects feedback gathered before the August recess.

data.title: DFDV increased its holdings by 196,141 SOLs, bringing its total holdings to over 2 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DeFi Dev Corp (DFDV) announced on the X platform that it has increased its holdings of SOL by 196,141 at an average price of $202.76. The total SOL treasury holdings now reach 2,027,817. As of September 4, DFDV's SOL and equivalents are worth $427 million.

data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Trump's policies are quite disinflationary
data.description: Milan, the nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, said that Trump's various policies are "quite disinflationary" and no one asked me to commit to voting for a rate cut. (Jinshi)

data.title: ETH Strategy increased its holdings by 233 ETH, bringing its total Ethereum holdings to 12,040.
data.description: Strategic ETH Reserve announced on the X platform that it has increased its holdings by 233 ETH at an average price of $4,480, bringing its total Ethereum holdings to 12,040. The funds used for this increase came from its newly launched Perpetual Note (ESPN).

data.title: Federal Reserve's Williams Anticipates Gradual Rate Cuts Amid Economic Forecasts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Williams has indicated that if the economy aligns with his predictions, interest rates are expected to be gradually reduced. He noted that tariffs could increase inflation by 1.00% to 1.50% this year. The unemployment rate is projected to rise to approximately 4.5% next year. So far, tariffs do not appear to have driven long-term inflation upward. Inflation is expected to be between 3% and 3.25% by 2025.

data.title: pump.fun: $12,192,383 worth of PUMP tokens purchased in the past week
data.description: pump.fun posted on the X platform that it has purchased $12,192,383 worth of PUMP tokens in the past week, equivalent to 98.23% of the total revenue from August 28 to September 3. PUMP purchases have now offset 5.363% of the total circulating supply, an increase of 1.102% over the past week.
